changelog: Added: Check All button for Free Rooms to quickly mark all free rooms as completed.
Improved: Free Rooms counter now tracks remaining rooms correctly and updates live after each completion.
Fixed: Rooms marked as done stay hidden consistently in THM Tracker (including after search/sort/filter changes).
Fixed: Completed free rooms are skipped from future auto-answer queues and not loaded again.
Improved: Live Search newly added rooms now respect done state immediately and stay hidden when already completed.
Improved: Checkbox UI visibility for clearer done-state indication.
Fixed: Prevented startup crash when free-room counter UI refreshed before free-room header initialization.
Fixed: Prevented KeyError when thm data is missing in progress state.
Fixed: Reduced Windows file-lock save failures by skipping unchanged section writes.
